command: for f in docs/README.md docs/guardrails.md docs/architecture/flake-topology.md docs/architecture/repo-roles.md docs/opencode.md docs/testing.md docs/migration.md docs/roadmap.md docs/stitch.md docs/tend.md docs/agents/tool-routing.md docs/workflows/agent-check-flow.md docs/workflows/agent-commit-flow.md docs/mcp/contracts.md; do [ -f "$f" ] || { echo "Missing: $f"; exit 1; }; done; echo "All docs present."

tasks.description: All OpenCode agents, commands, and skills exist
command:
for f in \
  .opencode/agents/phenix-coordinator.md \
  .opencode/agents/phenix-explorer.md \
  .opencode/agents/phenix-architect.md \
  .opencode/agents/phenix-toolsmith.md \
  .opencode/agents/phenix-gatekeeper.md \
  .opencode/agents/phenix-reviewer.md \
  .opencode/agents/phenix-simplifier.md \
  .opencode/commands/phenix-foundation.md \
  .opencode/commands/phenix-task.md \
  .opencode/skills/phenix-architecture/SKILL.md \
  .opencode/skills/phenix-tooling/SKILL.md; do \
  [ -f "$f" ] || { echo "Missing: $f"; exit 1; }; \
done; echo "All OpenCode config files present."

tasks.description: pt-compat crate has been removed entirely
command: if [ -d phenix-tools/crates/pt-compat ]; then echo 'ERROR: pt-compat crate still exists'; exit 1; fi; if grep -q 'pt-compat' phenix-tools/Cargo.toml; then echo 'ERROR: pt-compat still in workspace'; exit 1; fi; echo 'pt-compat fully removed.'

tasks.description: stitch does not read sync.json for validation or dependency resolution
command: if grep -r 'sync.json' phenix-tools/crates/stitch/src/ --include='*.rs' | grep -v 'test' | grep -v 'docs'; then echo 'ERROR: stitch still reads sync.json'; exit 1; fi; echo 'No sync.json consumption found.'

tasks.description: No Nix file exports gate packages or apps
command: for f in phenix-tools/modules/standalone.nix phenix-tools/modules/default.nix flake.nix; do if grep -q 'packages\.gate\|apps\.gate\|"gate"' "$f" 2>/dev/null; then echo "ERROR: gate still exported from $f"; exit 1; fi; done; echo 'No gate Nix export.'

tasks.description: stitch commit has no deprecated legacy surfaces
command:
# Only check deprecated commit surfaces within the Commit command definition.
commit_section=$(sed -n '/^    Commit {/,/^    Push {/p' phenix-tools/crates/stitch-cli/src/main.rs 2>/dev/null)
for flag in no_tend no_push cmd_sync_commit; do
  if echo "$commit_section" | grep -q "$flag"; then
    echo "ERROR: deprecated commit surface '$flag' still in stitch commit"; exit 1
  fi
done
echo 'No deprecated commit flags.'

tasks.description: stitch CLI has a Sync command
command: if grep -q 'Sync' phenix-tools/crates/stitch-cli/src/main.rs; then echo 'Sync command found'; else echo 'ERROR: Sync command missing from stitch CLI'; exit 1; fi

tasks.description: tend CLI has an Explain command with implementation
command: if ! grep -q 'Explain' phenix-tools/crates/tend-cli/src/main.rs; then echo 'ERROR: Explain enum missing'; exit 1; fi; if ! grep -q 'fn cmd_explain' phenix-tools/crates/tend-cli/src/main.rs; then echo 'ERROR: cmd_explain implementation missing'; exit 1; fi; echo 'tend explain exists and is implemented.'

tasks.description: stitch MCP does not expose stitch.commit_sync alias
command: if grep -q 'commit_sync\|StitchCommitSyncTool' phenix-tools/crates/stitch-mcp/src/tools.rs; then echo 'ERROR: stitch.commit_sync still defined'; exit 1; fi; echo 'No commit_sync alias.'

tasks.description: MCP routing docs referenced by README exist
command: for f in docs/agents/tool-routing.md docs/workflows/agent-check-flow.md docs/workflows/agent-commit-flow.md docs/mcp/contracts.md; do [ -f "$f" ] || { echo "Missing: $f"; exit 1; }; done; echo "All MCP routing docs present."

tasks.description: MCP contracts must not classify tend.run as CreatesCommit
command: if grep -P '`tend\.run`[^|]*\|\s+CreatesCommit' docs/mcp/contracts.md; then echo 'ERROR: tend.run is incorrectly classified as CreatesCommit in the Mutation column'; exit 1; fi; echo 'tend.run mutation classification is clean.'

tasks.description: stitch commit must use local commit wrappers, not visible sync execution
command: if awk '/fn cmd_commit/,/^}/' phenix-tools/crates/stitch-cli/src/main.rs | grep -q 'execute_sync'; then echo 'ERROR: cmd_commit still calls execute_sync directly'; exit 1; fi; echo 'cmd_commit uses local commit execution.'

tasks.description: stitch commit help must not describe sync/update/push behavior
command: commit_section=$(sed -n '/^    Commit {/,/^    Push {/p' phenix-tools/crates/stitch-cli/src/main.rs 2>/dev/null); if echo "$commit_section" | grep -n 'Create DAG-wide sync commits\|update dependent flake inputs\|push in dependency order'; then echo 'ERROR: stitch commit help still describes sync/push behavior'; exit 1; fi; echo 'stitch commit help is clean.'

tasks.description: MCP contracts must describe stitch.commit as local-only
command: if grep -q '`stitch.commit`.*DAG-wide' docs/mcp/contracts.md; then echo 'ERROR: stitch.commit contract still says DAG-wide'; exit 1; fi; echo 'stitch.commit contract is local-only.'

tasks.description: stitch --messages parser accepts the wrapped format produced by --write-template
command: if ! grep -q 'get("messages")' phenix-tools/crates/stitch-cli/src/main.rs; then echo 'ERROR: stitch messages parser does not accept wrapped { messages: ... } format'; exit 1; fi; echo 'stitch messages parser accepts wrapped format.'

tasks.description: Validate flake dependency topology matches layer model
command: cd /home/matthisk/phenix && cfg=.stitch/topology.json && [ -f "$cfg" ] || { echo "Missing $cfg"; exit 1; } && echo "=== Topology validation ===" && for row in $(jq -r '.repos[] | @base64' "$cfg"); do _jq() { echo "$row" | base64 -d | jq -r "$1"; }; name=$(_jq '.name'); role=$(_jq '.role'); layer=$(_jq '.layer'); path=$(_jq '.localPath'); if [ "$path" != "." ]; then [ -d "$path" ] || { echo "FAIL: $name path $path missing"; exit 1; }; [ -f "$path/flake.nix" ] || { echo "FAIL: $name has no flake.nix at $path"; exit 1; }; fi; echo "  OK $name (role=$role layer=$layer)"; done && echo "=== Layer ordering ===" && for row in $(jq -r '.repos[] | select(.localPath != ".") | @base64' "$cfg"); do _jq() { echo "$row" | base64 -d | jq -r "$1"; }; name=$(_jq '.name'); role=$(_jq '.role'); layer=$(_jq '.layer'); path=$(_jq '.localPath'); dir_layer=$(echo "$path" | sed 's|\./flakes/\([0-9]\+\)\(-.*\)/.*|\1|'); dir_layer_num=$((10#$dir_layer)); if [ "$dir_layer_num" -ne "$layer" ]; then echo "FAIL: $name at $path has folder layer $dir_layer but config layer $layer"; exit 1; fi; done && echo "  Layer-prefix checks pass" && echo "=== Root dependency check ===" && for dir in flakes/*/*/; do f="$dir/flake.nix"; [ -f "$f" ] || continue; if grep -q 'github:matthis-k/phenix"' "$f" 2>/dev/null || grep -q 'github:matthis-k/phenix\s' "$f" 2>/dev/null; then echo "FAIL: child flake $f depends on root phenix"; exit 1; fi; done && echo "  No root deps in children" && echo "=== All topology checks passed ==="

tasks.description: Workspace lock-derived DAG has no cycles or topology violations (via shell)
Workspace lock-derived DAG has no cycles or topology violations (direct)
